---
title: "Schedule"
date: "today"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    link-external-newwindow: true
    toc: true
    highlight-style: ayu
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.title{
  font-size: 30px;
  color: #5B9BD5;
  background-color: #fff;
  padding: 0px;
}

.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(11) td, 
.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(17) td,
.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(n+21):nth-child(-n+23) td,
.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(28) td,
.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(32) td,
.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(n+37):nth-child(-n+39) td, 
.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(43) td, 
.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(n+48):nth-child(-n+50) td, 
.assignments table tbody tr:nth-child(n+57):nth-child(-n+58) td{
  background-color: #f0f6fc !important;
  color: #5B9BD5; 
}

.red table tbody tr:nth-child(1) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(6) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(13) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(19) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(25) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(30) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(34) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(41) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(45) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(52) td,
.red table tbody tr:nth-child(56) td {
  background-color: #C2352F !important; /* A light red; use 'red' for bright red */
  color: #fff; 
  height: 5px; 
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
source(here("class_dates.R"))
```

| Date | Les-son | Topic | Video | [TB 1](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/) | [TB 2](https://epirhandbook.com/en/) | Slides HTML | Slides PDF | Practice |
|:--:|:--:|:---|:--:|:--:|----|:--:|:--:|:--:|
|  | 0 | Welcome |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| `{r} w1d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 1 | Introduction to the Introduction | [{{< iconify mdi video size=34px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [Intro](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/intro.html) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w1d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 2 | Downloading R and RStudio | [{{< iconify mdi video size=34px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  | [3.4](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/basics.html#installation) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w2d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 3 | Workflow: Basics | [{{< iconify mdi video size=34px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [2.1-2.3](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/workflow-basics.html) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w2d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 4 | Functions | [{{< iconify mdi video size=34px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [2.4](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/workflow-basics.html#calling-functions) | [3.6](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/basics.html#functions) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w3d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 5 | Packages | [{{< iconify mdi video size=34px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  | [3.7](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/basics.html#packages) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w3d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 6 | Scripts | [{{< iconify mdi video size=34px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [6.1](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/workflow-scripts.html#scripts) | [3.8](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/basics.html#scripts) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w4d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 7 | R projects and working directories |  | [6.2](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/workflow-scripts.html#projects) | [6](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/r_projects.html) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w4d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 8 | Objects |  |  | [3.10](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/basics.html#objects) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w5d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 9 | Piping |  | [3.4](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-transform.html#sec-the-pipe) | [8.1](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/basics.html#piping) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w5d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 10 | Key operators and functions |  |  | [8.2](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/basics.html#operators) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w6d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 11 | Tidy data |  | [5.2](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-tidy.html#sec-tidy-data) | [4.1](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/transition_to_R.html#tidy-data) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w6d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 12 | Import and Export |  | [7](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-import.html) | [7](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/importing.html) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w7d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 13 | Workflow: code style |  | [4](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/workflow-style.html) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w7d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 14 | Workflow: getting help |  | [8](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/workflow-help.html) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w8d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 15 | Data transformation: basics |  | [3.1](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-transform.html#introduction) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w9d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 16 | Data transformation: rows |  | [3.2](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-transform.html#rows) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w10d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 17 | Data transformation: columns | [{{< iconify mdi video size=34px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [3.3](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-transform.html#columns) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w10d2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 18 | Data transformation: groups | [{{< iconify mdi video size=34px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [3.5](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-transform.html#groups) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
|  | 19 | Descriptive tables |  |  | [17](https://epirhandbook.com/en/new_pages/tables_descriptive.html) | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
| `{r} w11d1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | 20 | Lengthening data |  | [5.3](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-tidy.html#sec-pivoting) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
|  | 21 | Widening data |  | [5.4](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-tidy.html#widening-data) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
|  | 22 | Data visualization: intro to ggplot |  | [1.1-1.2](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html#introduction) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
|  | 23 | Data visualization: ggplot2 calls |  | [1.3](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html#sec-ggplot2-calls) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
|  | 24 | Data visualization: distributions |  | [1.4](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html#visualizing-distributions) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
|  | 25 | Data visualization: relationships |  | [1.5](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html#visualizing-relationships) |  | [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify bi file-earmark-pdf-fill size=28px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
